docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-02-2022 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MA, YANNA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ZHU, JIECONG $1,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $30.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,030.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,000.00 FILED BY MA, YANNA AS TO DEFENDANT ZHU, JIECONG ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-02-2022 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
STIPULATION FOR JUDGE PRO TEM FILED BY PLAINTIFF MA, YANNA
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (NO SERVICE FEE INDICATED) SERVED SEP-14-2022, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT ZHU, JIECONG

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-02-2022 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-02-2022 BY JUDGE PRO TEM WILLIAM LYNN. PLAINTIFF YANNA MA IS PRESENT AND ASSISTED BY PROVISIONALLY QUALIFIED CANTONESE COURT INTERPRETER REBECCA CHAU. DEFENDANT JIECONG ZHU IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: WILLIAM LYNN; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
